历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science were approximately 4366 → 4669 → 4364, fluctuating within the range of 4364–4669 over the past three years. The baseline for 2025 is about 4364, showing a recovery compared to 2024. The enrollment plan for Science in this province was 39 in 2023, 38 in 2024, and 39 in 2025; for 2026, the plan is 38, a decrease of 1 from 2025, indicating a slight reduction in enrollment and a minor increase in competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 66th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable ranking range of 65–76 in recent years, placing it at an upper-middle level among finance and economics institutions. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. It ranks 92nd in Douyin popularity, with average reviews and moderately low short video exposure, showing no significant signs of increased application interest. Applied Economics is rated A+, Business Administration A, and Statistics A-, highlighting strong disciplinary strengths in finance and economics, which strongly attract applications to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of finance/economics/economy majors shows divergence and wait-and-see attitudes, while accounting/finance/auditing majors are recommended as relatively hot. The total number of examinees in this province for 2026 is approximately 238,000 (a significant increase from about 76,500 in 2025), with an estimated 163,000 Science examinees based on historical proportions, leading to a marked intensification of competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the substantial increase in the number of examinees in this province, competition is expected to intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 4364. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4247, with a range of 3747–4747.
